# Grappes

> AI website generator that builds custom-designed sites from a brief — no templates, no coding. Tell Grappes about your business and get a fully designed, deployed website in under 90 seconds.

Grappes generates each website from scratch using a multi-stage AI pipeline (Claude Opus for creative direction, Sonnet for HTML/CSS, Haiku for QA). Every site is unique — no template library, no shared CSS, no recycled layouts.

## Core

- [Home](https://grappes.dev/): What Grappes is and how it works
- [Sign up](https://grappes.dev/sign-up): Free trial, no credit card required
- [Sign in](https://grappes.dev/sign-in): Account access for existing users
